subcodes.first_line: O steadfast and thankful one! Though this mourning be an ocean of sorrow and grief, and this calamity a soul-consuming fire of pain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای صابره شاکره هر چند این ماتم دریای اندوه و غمست و این مصیبت آتش جانسوز درد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love and unity
